pi_items.source: FITS header (INSTRUME='WFPC2', ORIGIN='STScI-STSDAS', esahubble.org download link)
FITS header (TARGNAME='M16-A') and general knowledge of the dataset
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh use this path

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real FITS data (656nmos.fits) from the ESA Hubble Eagle Nebula dataset. The FITS header confirms it is from the WFPC2 instrument using the F656N (H-alpha) filter, targeting M16. A local python script dynamically computes the ground truth fwhm_pixels as 169 (16.9 arcsec) from the data to evaluate the agent. However, a critical defect was discovered: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
